name: Smoked Sausage Stir-Fry
recipeIngredient: 1 stalk broccoli (cut into strips and flowerets)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the smoked sausage into 4 long pieces, then slice each piece thinly to create small pie-shaped pieces.
2. In a large serving pan, sauté the sausage until browned.
3. Add the vegetables to the pan and continue sautéing.
4. Cover and steam the mixture for a few minutes.
5. Meanwhile, bring 2 to 3 quarts of water to a boil in a separate pan. Add the Ramen noodles and seasonings (soy sauce and sweet and sour sauce are optional) and cook for no longer than 5 minutes.
6. Drain the cooked noodles and pour them into the sautéing mixture with the sausage and vegetables.
7. Serve hot, garnished with soy sauce, sweet and sour sauce, rolls or egg rolls, fruit salad, and cookies for dessert.
